label: What Makes Usyk's Footwork So Effective?
title: What Makes Usyk's Footwork So Effective?
subtitle: A practical breakdown of Usyk's footwork, angles, rhythm, balance, and what beginners can learn from his movement.
description: Learn why Usyk's footwork is so effective, from angles and rhythm to balance, distance control, southpaw positioning, and beginner training tips.
altText: Oleksandr Usyk inspired boxing footwork training with a fighter moving around the ring using angles and balance.
